fun_fact: Walking is one of the most natural things humans do — yet in most Indian cities it has become nearly impossible. Broken, blocked or missing footpaths push pedestrians into traffic, a problem so severe that India's Supreme Court observed the right to walk safely should be treated as a fundamental right. [Why has walking become impossible in India?](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2k_7wrxyRqI&t=19s)
